description: Allternit Office Add-in plugin registry. Plugin content lives canonically at surfaces/platform/src/plugins/vendor/office-{excel,word,powerpoint}/

plugins.name: Allternit for Excel
plugins.description: Deep Excel automation — formulas, charts, tables, financial modeling, data validation

plugins.name: Allternit for PowerPoint
plugins.description: Slide creation, design, content generation, and deck automation for PowerPoint

plugins.name: Allternit for Word
plugins.description: Document drafting, editing, redlining, style application, and structured content for Word
